name: hover-card
visual_summary: hover-card is a hover card UI component from the parkui corpus. It provides reusable card behavior and styling for React or web UI screens.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready card component with the following characteristics:

Name: hover-card
Description: hover-card is a hover card UI component from the parkui corpus. It provides reusable card behavior and styling for React or web UI screens.
Style: 
Interactions: 
Tags: card, hover, parkui

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
Reference implementation (adapt don't copy):
// src/components/ui/hover-card.tsx
'use client'
import { HoverCard } from '@ark-ui/react/hover-card'
import type { ComponentProps } from 'react'
import { createStyleContext } from 'styled-system/jsx'
import { hoverCard } from 'styled-system/recipes'

const { withRootProvider, withContext } = createStyleContext(hoverCard)

export type RootProps = ComponentProps<typeof Root>
export const Root = withRootProvider(HoverCard.Root)
export const RootProvider = withRootProvider(HoverCard.RootProvider)
